ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Cashew nut, dry-grilled, no added salt
Pistachio nut, grilled, no added salt

ingredients_text: Flame raisins (20%) (raisins, sunflower oil), Golden raisins (15%) (raisins, sunflower oil, preservative (sulphur dioxide)), Brazil nuts (15%), Sweetened dried cranberries (10%) (cranberries, cane sugar, sunflower oil), Almonds (10%), Cashew nuts (10%), Pistachio nuts (10%), Pecan nuts (10%).
